focus: Arena Field Edition M2 — TWO launch-readiness deliverables. (A) The first-boot `fieldkit field-edition verify` receipt is NEAR-ALL-GREEN: 4 PASS / 0 fail / 0 error / 1 skip (ok=True), live-smoked end-to-end ~86s. The `lane` gate (warm-resident — operator chose don't-tear-down for the §6-vs-§8 fork; floor reworked to launched+generated) and the Cortex grounded-contract half (new pure fieldkit.field_edition.grounded reuses the already-frozen recall probes + ported Advisor grounded prompt; deterministic 39-probe slice answered over LIVE retrieval, scored by the shared advisor.score_output; contract_pass = refusals 16/16 AND citation ≥0.80) both went from honest-error → measured-live PASS. Live: recall 0.977 + grounded citation 19/23 (82.6%) + refusals 16/16 → PASS 56s; the 4 misses are genuine model misses (gold present), not artifacts. Only optional hermes remains unwired. (B) AC-7 v1 license file delivered — fieldkit.field_edition.license: offline Ed25519-verified JSON entitlement file, GHCR pull-token bound by the signature (the entire DRM), canonical_bytes signing contract (compact/key-sorted/UTF-8/no-floats) for Mac's fulfillLicense, load_license parses→verifies→enforces-term. Prod key = PROD_KEY_PENDING until ops sends the pubkey. tier/edition/entitlements = SOFT known-set (recognized for display, unrecognized logged+accepted, never rejected — keeps SKU velocity decoupled). Full schema + JS port + keygen recipe + a valid sample delivered to the relay. 14 new tests (123 field_edition); full suite 1294 passed (only the 3 documented env arena failures). No version bump, no website rebuild.
